subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God, O maidservant of Bahá! The morn of guidance hath risen from the Most Exalted Horizon, and East and West of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ای امه البهاء صبح هدی چون از افق اعلی طلوع نمود و شرق و غرب ابداع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for protection
